title: bupleurum tenue
intro: Bupleurum tenue is a type of flowering plant in the genus Bupleurum, commonly known as Chinese thorowax or narrow-hooded hare's ear. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Bupleurum tenue include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate liver and gallbladder issues, and improve immune function. Bupleurum tenue can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
